title: Stego's Dragons
description: This addon adds a bunch of HTTYD dragons to your Isle of Berk experience!
body:
!!!IMPORTANT: YOU ALSO NEED TO INSTALL CONFIG FOR IT TO WORK PROPERLY!!!

!!DISCONTINUED - MERGED WITH ARCHIPELLAGO ADDITIONS!!

-------------------------
Summary:
This addon for the mod Isle of Berk adds 10 dragons into your world. All thanks to Nord_Act's Isle of Berk Variant Loader, which lets us add remodeled, retextured and reanimated variants as new dragons without replacing existing variants, but at the same time does not allow us to add custom abilities, so these new dragons have missmatched abilities from their base dragon.
 To report bugs, or you need help, go to our Discord server (this discord is not just for this addon so there is some other stuff, mainly future addon for future mod New Berk's Dawn)

-------------------------
Details:
- adds 10 new dragons from HTTYD franchise (flame whipper, hobblegrunt, night terror, prickleboggle, songwing, thunderbottom, fireworm, fireworm queen, devillish dervish, shockjaw)
- also adds 1 variant to Hideous Zippleback called "Fart & Smella"
- adds fireworm queen and night terror nests

-------------------------
All stuff and additional information can be found on the Wiki

-------------------------
Requirements:
- forge version 4.2.10 or above
- Geckolib (1.18.2-3.0.46)
- Isle of Berk (1.18.2-1.2.0)
- Isle of Berk Variant loader (1.18.2-2.4.0)
- Isle of Berk Addons (1.18.2-1.1d)
- Archipelago Additions (1.18.2-2.1.1)
- additionally, you will need config file to make the new dragons spawn in your world. Install it AFTER installing Archipelago Additions config! The config is donwloadable on discord
- installation guide is on the Wiki

-------------------------
This mod is incompatible with Optifine!

If you are using biome adding mods it will make the nests and dragons generate much less

-------------------------
Credits/disclaimer:
Stego's dragons is developed by KingStego01. Remodels and base textures by KingStego01, variants are by KingStego01/EclipseOrMidnight/Gecko_sauce/Mqzikeen/Paradox, animations edited by KingStego01/Mqzikeen, coding by KingStego01/Sakura/LuckiestLycan/EclipseOrMidnight. 
Our license is and shall remain ARR, to protect these assets of which we have use and distribution permissions but not ownership. Dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. Stego's dragons does not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. We are permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them.
Screenshots taken by KingStego01 using Complementary Shaders - Unbound
